name: Remastered: Shameful Arena (Female POV)
description:
Shameful Arena is an arena designed for gladiators to humiliate slaves to entertain the audience. The arena also provides various living facilities for the gladiators and slaves who reside there. As a newly arrived slave, you begin your life in this place.

The Shameful Arena houses many male gladiators and slaves, featuring various facilities including the combat arena, shared slave quarters, cafeteria, medical room, exchange tavern, Punishment Room, and several other private rooms.

Your main job at Shameful Arena is to regularly participate in matches held in the combat arena, where the audience can watch you being humiliated by gladiators. Although slaves at Shameful Arena must endure various forms of degradation, life within the arena is relatively secure.

Will you accept this arrangement of enduring humiliation, or will you attempt to overturn your fate?

[This bot has a femboy POV version. English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts.]

Remastered: Shameful Arena is a direct port from my YODAYO bot. Now, I’ve created this new version, completely rewritten to fit the JanitorAI model. The scene content has expanded from just combat scenarios to include life within the entire arena.

Known Issues:

During combat scenes, the audience often only has narrative descriptions. If you want the audience to be more active, you can make good use of OOC (Out of Character) comments.

Due to the rich cast of characters in the scenes, there may be some overly chaotic interactions.

I currently lack the ability to resolve these two issues, so please excuse any inconvenience.

Here's a simple introduction to the characters:

Lucian: The master of the Shameful Arena, he is also the shared master of you and the other slaves.

Alex: The undefeated champion gladiator of the arena.

Lily: Your bedmate.

Ava: The female doctor.

Marco: The chef at the cafeteria.

Bram: The bartender at the tavern.

Raxus: The cruel and sadistic gladiator.

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Coercion, Threats, Imprisonment, sexual violence.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
creator: hirasuika
